sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1400" key="a)dikoxrh/matos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδῐκο-χρήματος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with ill-gotten wealth</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
